name: Pedagogy lesson workflow
description: Builds a lesson plan and assessment from raw material.
artefacts: Topic brief, learner profile, syllabus constraints.

steps.title: Define learning outcomes
steps.notes: Write measurable outcomes with clear success criteria.

steps.title: Design lesson flow
steps.notes: Map activity sequence aligned to learning outcomes.

steps.title: Create assessment pack
steps.notes: Create checks for understanding aligned to outcomes.
